svg.title: Kalio v2 chat and tool loop flow
svg.desc: Swim lane: Frontend purple left, Backend teal right, connected by Socket.IO events

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does ChatInput connect to the backend in Kalio v2?')
sendPrompt('How does ChatStore handle streaming in Kalio v2?')
sendPrompt('How does MessageBubble render streaming content?')
sendPrompt('What does ChatGateway do in NestJS?')
sendPrompt('How does LLMService route providers in Kalio v2?')
sendPrompt('Which LLM providers does Kalio v2 support?')
sendPrompt('How does ToolDispatcher work in Kalio v2?')
